CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-07-2013 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2013 Continued To May-21-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-25-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Apr-16-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Mtn Fo Rleave To Re-Open Disco
Off Calendar Feb-05-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jodie G. Steinberg, Esq. of Clasen Raffalow & Rhoads, Tel. 877.707.7992, for defendant and moving party;
Pavel Krepkiy, Esq. of Anna Dubrovsky Law Group, Tel. 415.746.1477 ext. 219, for plaintiff and opposing party.

RULING: A R G U E D. At the conclusion of argument, the court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS SATINDER JIT SINGH AND LUXOR CAB COMPANY'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO RE-OPEN DISCOVERY IS DENIED. DEFENDANTS HAVE FAILED TO MAKE ANY SHOWING OF GOOD CAUSE AS TO WHY THEY COULD NOT HAVE INITIATED AND COMPLETED THE REQUESTED DISCOVERY WITHIN THE TIME PERIOD SPECIFIED. DEFENDANT PRESENTED NO EVIDENCE AS TO WHY IT DIDN'T RETAIN A MEDICAL EXPERT LONG BEFORE DECEMBER AND WAS WELL AWARE OF PLAINTIFF'S PRIOR INJURY. WITH THE TRIAL SCHEDULED FOR FEBRUARY 25, 2013, TO RE-OPEN DISCOVERY COULD WELL PREJUDICE PLAINTIFF'S RIGHT TO HAVE THIS MATTER GO TO TRIAL AS SCHEDULED. Counsel for plaintiff to submit a proposed order. Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported
